14.reason: Error: Using character literals 's[i-1]' instead of the variable s[i-1]; also missing check that i-1 and i+1 are within bounds.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Using character literals 's[i-1]' instead of the variable s[i-1]; also missing check that i-1 and i+1 are within bounds.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Using character literals 's[i-1]' and 's[i+1]' instead of the actual array elements s[i-1] and s[i+1]. This compares the literal characters 's', '[', 'i', etc., not the values in the array.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Syntax error: single quotes around array elements make them invalid expressions; should be '0' <= s[i-1] && s[i-1] < s[i+1] && s[i+1] <= '9']
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Using string literal 's[i-1]' instead of variable s[i-1]; also condition logic incorrectly placed quotes and missing proper range checks.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Single quotes around array subscripts 's[i-1]' and 's[i+1]' incorrectly create multi-character constants instead of accessing array elements, causing compilation errors and logical failures. The quotes should be removed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Single quotes are incorrectly used around array access expressions 's[i-1]' and 's[i+1]', creating multi-character literals instead of accessing array elements, which causes a compilation error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Character literals 's[i-1]' and 's[i+1]' are incorrect; should be variable references s[i-1] and s[i+1] without quotes]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Character literals like 's[i-1]' are invalid; should be s[i-1] without quotes to refer to the actual character in the array]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same error: single quotes around array subscripts cause compilation/logical errors and must be removed to correctly access the characters.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Single quotes are incorrectly used around array access expressions 's[i-1]' and 's[i+1]', creating multi-character literals instead of accessing array elements, which causes a compilation error.
